title: Add device_id field to PublishKeyPackageParams
description:
Add device_id: String field to PublishKeyPackageParams in core/src/protocol.rs.

What: Add one field to the struct so clients can declare which device is publishing a KeyPackage.

Algorithm:
1. In core/src/protocol.rs, add device_id: String to PublishKeyPackageParams after data field
2. The field is plain serde String (no Base64 encoding) — it is a 64-char hex string

Defensive rules:
- No validation here (relay-side validation is a separate bead)
- Field is required (not Option) — the client must always provide it

Tests: serialization roundtrip — PublishKeyPackageParams { device_id: 'a'*64, data: vec![1,2,3] } serializes and deserializes back correctly.
acceptance_criteria: cargo test -p nie-core passes; PublishKeyPackageParams JSON includes device_id field; cargo clippy -p nie-core clean
